variables.notes: Changed Manually. The selected XSGA bucket excludes any explicit D&A row, and these D&A lines appear separately at the same operating level, so they are not already embedded in the selected XSGA rows. The summary row 'Depreciation and Impairment' is not chosen because it includes impairment, which should be ignored. Using the visible non-impairment components is the best operating-only approximation, but allocation between production and overhead is not explicit, so manual review is warranted.
